summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All CRITICAL features verified: LLM-powered chat (GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key) working with contextual responses, chat-based booking flow working (sends message to chat, LLM asks for name), invisible scrollbars (scrollbar-width:none), chat close button NOT overlapping topic tag (8px gap), mobile layout (375px) properly padded, cookie banner buttons visible, admin login working (rate limit 20/5min), all legal pages have NL law references.
passed_tests: CRITICAL: Chat LLM - GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key returns contextual responses mentioning specific services (SAP, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)
CRITICAL: Chat booking flow - 'Termin buchen' button sends message to chat, LLM asks for name/email
CRITICAL: Invisible scrollbars - scrollbar-width:none confirmed in chat messages area
CRITICAL: Chat close button (X) - 8px gap from 'Thema' tag, NO overlap
CRITICAL: Mobile layout (375px) - No elements touching left viewport edge, 20px padding on container
CRITICAL: Hero stats has border-top separator (48px gap from buttons)
CRITICAL: Cookie consent banner - buttons fully visible on mobile (375px)
Admin login - p.courbois@icloud.com / NxAi#Secure2026! works, no rate limit error
Admin dashboard - stats cards, leads table, Termine tab all visible
Legal: /impressum - contains 'Burgerlijk Wetboek' and 'Kamer van Koophandel'
Legal: /ki-hinweise - contains 'EU AI Act' and compliance table
Integrations section - 64 integrations in 10 categories (exceeds 50+ requirement)
critical_code_review_comments: LLM chat is now REAL (GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key) - no longer mocked/rule-based
Chat booking creates real DB entries and sends confirmation emails
Admin rate limit increased to 20 requests/5 minutes (was 5)
All legal pages properly reference NL law (Burgerlijk Wetboek, UAVG, Boek 6 BW, EU AI Act)

test_credentials.note: Password stored in backend/.env as ADMIN_PASSWORD

seed_data_creation: Test bookings created via chat LLM during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRITICAL features from iteration 4 verified: 1) LLM chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env), 2) Chat booking flow works - 'Termin buchen' sends message, LLM collects data, creates booking with [BOOKING_REQUEST] tag, 3) Invisible scrollbars via CSS scrollbar-width:none, 4) Chat close button has z-index:20 and padding-right:56px on header prevents overlap, 5) Admin rate limit is 20/5min, 6) Legal pages have NL law references. NO mocked APIs.

mocked_apis.note: Chat is now LLM-powered (real GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key). Booking from chat creates real DB entries and sends real emails.
